mapper.select: SELECT JSON_VALUE(q.QSTN_CN, '$.topic') AS topic, ROUND(AVG(a.SCORE / q.ALLOC_SCR) * 100, 0) AS avgScoreRate, COUNT(*) AS answerCount FROM ANSWER_SUBMIT a JOIN QUESTION_LIST q ON a.QSTN_SN = q.QSTN_SN JOIN EXAM_QUESTION eq ON eq.QSTN_SN = q.QSTN_SN JOIN EXAM e ON e.EXAM_SN = eq.EXAM_SN AND e.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND e.EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm ON a.STD_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' WHERE a.SCORE IS NOT NULL AND JSON_VALUE(q.QSTN_CN, '$.topic') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY JSON_VALUE(q.QSTN_CN, '$.topic') HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avgScoreRate ASC

SELECT NVL(q.DIFF_CD, 'NONE') AS diffCd, ROUND(AVG(a.SCORE / q.ALLOC_SCR) * 100, 0) AS avgScoreRate, COUNT(*) AS answerCount FROM ANSWER_SUBMIT a JOIN QUESTION_LIST q ON a.QSTN_SN = q.QSTN_SN JOIN EXAM_QUESTION eq ON eq.QSTN_SN = q.QSTN_SN JOIN EXAM e ON e.EXAM_SN = eq.EXAM_SN AND e.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND e.EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm ON a.STD_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' WHERE a.SCORE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY NVL(q.DIFF_CD, 'NONE') ORDER BY CASE NVL(q.DIFF_CD, 'NONE') WHEN 'EASY' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 WHEN 'HARD' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

SELECT e.EXAM_SN AS examSn, e.EXAM_REG_NM AS examNm, ROUND(AVG(et.TOT_SCORE / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(q2.ALLOC_SCR) FROM EXAM_QUESTION eq2 JOIN QUESTION_LIST q2 ON q2.QSTN_SN = eq2.QSTN_SN WHERE eq2.EXAM_SN = e.EXAM_SN), 0)) * 100, 1) AS avgScoreRate, COUNT(et.STD_USER_ID) AS takerCount FROM EXAM_TAKER et JOIN EXAM e ON e.EXAM_SN = et.EXAM_SN AND e.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND e.EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm ON et.STD_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID AND cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' WHERE et.TOT_SCORE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.EXAM_SN, e.EXAM_REG_NM ORDER BY MIN(et.SBMT_DT) ASC
